---
title: "Papers"
description: "Project pages — one page per paper. Pointer-rich index linked from the CV."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  feed: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
page-layout: full
date-modified: last-modified
---

Click a paper for the project page (figures, abstract, code, BibTeX, video).
The full list with full citations lives on the
[CV PDF](https://loevlie.github.io/cv/loevlie-cv-latest.pdf).
